title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 April 2026
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 April 2026
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 April 2026
summary:
Main
Indian recyclers continue to face challenges in securing fresh tonnage, as higher price levels offered by Bangladesh are drawing vessels away from the market. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
Indian recyclers continue to face challenges in securing fresh tonnage, as higher price
levels offered by Bangladesh are drawing vessels away from the market. Domestic steel prices remain under pressure, limiting buyers' ability to match
competing regional offers.
